items.author: Lev Akabas
items.body_excerpt:

• I didn't realize Germany had the third-highest GDP in the world?

items.title: How often do the greats get traded? 🤔
items.author: Basketball Reference
items.body_excerpt:
How often do the greats get traded? 🤔

Giannis Antetokounmpo ranks 23rd all-time, among qualifying players, in win shares per 48 minutes. Of the top 25, more than half of them have been traded at least once.

Of the 14 who have been traded, the majority (8 out of 14) have been dealt more than once.

items.title: My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: The NBA draft starts tonight and the #Magic enter with a lone 2nd-round pick.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: The NBA draft starts tonight and the #Magic enter with a lone 2nd-round pick.

“We have the 46th pick, and we like our team a lot,” Orlando president of basketball operations Jeff Weltman said last Thursday.

More inside: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/06/22/o...

media.title: NBA draft preview: Magic enter with lone 2nd-rounder but ‘bullish’ on team
media.description: The last time the Magic didn’t have a first-round draft pick was 2011. Orlando enters this week’s NBA draft with only the No. 46 pick in the second round.
